name: ObjectPlotColorSource
summary: Defines enumerated values for the source of plotting/printing color of single objects.

enum_values.name: PlotColorFromLayer
enum_values.summary: use plot color assigned to layer.

enum_values.name: PlotColorFromObject
enum_values.summary: use plot color assigned to object.

enum_values.name: PlotColorFromParent
enum_values.summary: for objects with parents (like objects in instance references, use parent plot color) if no parent, treat as plot_color_from_layer.
